import { useState } from 'react'; import { COLLEGES } from '../data'; const STREAMS = ['All Streams', 'Engineering', 'Medical', 'Management', 'Arts']; const STATES = ['All States', 'Delhi', 'Maharashtra', 'Karnataka', 'Tamil Nadu', 'Rajasthan', 'Telangana']; const BUDGETS = ['Any Budget', 'Under ₹1L', '₹1 – 3L', '₹3 – 8L', '₹8L+']; const RATINGS = ['Any Rating', '4.5+', '4.0+', '3.5+']; const SORT_OPTS = ['Best Match', 'Highest Rating', 'Lowest Fees']; export default function CollegeFinder() { const [stream, setStream] = useState('All Streams'); const [state, setState] = useState('All States'); const [budget, setBudget] = useState('Any Budget'); const [rating, setRating] = useState('Any Rating'); const [sort, setSort] = useState('Best Match'); const [search, setSearch] = useState(''); let colleges = [...COLLEGES]; if (search) colleges = colleges.filter(c => c.name.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()) || c.loc.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase())); if (stream !== 'All Streams') colleges = colleges.filter(c => c.stream === stream); if (sort === 'Best Match') colleges.sort((a, b) => b.match - a.match); if (sort === 'Highest Rating') colleges.sort((a, b) => parseFloat(b.rating) - parseFloat(a.rating)); return (
